title: HMC App Platform Feature Catalog
description: Schema for validating the HMC App Platform feature catalog array.

Feature.description: A single feature in the HMC App Platform catalog.

id.description: Unique feature identifier in the format F-NNN.

description.description: Detailed description of the feature's capabilities.

complexity.description: Estimated implementation complexity: S (Small), M (Medium), L (Large), XL (Extra Large).

package.description: NPM package name if extracted (e.g., @hmc/auth), or null if not yet extracted.

status.description: Current status: extracted (code exists as a package), planned (designed but not extracted), domain (domain-specific, stays in source repo).

bestSource.description: The repository with the best/most complete implementation of this feature.

alsoIn.description: Other repositories that also contain an implementation of this feature.

dependencies.description: Feature IDs that this feature depends on.

configRequired.description: Configuration values or secrets required to use this feature.

tags.description: Searchable tags for discovery and categorization.
